subcodes.first_line: O friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Know ye that 'Abdu'l-Bahá, like unto a rose-garden refreshed by the dew, remembereth the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء این را بدانید که عبدالبهاء مانند گلشن بشبنم یاد یاران
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise and encouragement, @high station of the true believer
